family_description: classic preset stories plus deterministic generated workload families for broader scheduler comparisons

algorithms.label: MLFQ interactive (q=1/2/4, boost=8)
algorithms.mlfq_variant_headline: faster boosts plus a short top quantum favor quick foreground response

algorithms.label: MLFQ balanced (q=2/4/8, boost=12)
algorithms.mlfq_variant_headline: the default queue ladder balances short-job response with moderate churn

algorithms.label: MLFQ throughput (q=4/8/16, boost=off)
algorithms.mlfq_variant_headline: longer quanta and no periodic boost reduce dispatch churn for batch-heavy mixes

scorecards.label: SRTF
scorecards.use_when: best when total batch completion time matters most
scorecards.headline: turnaround 6/6, waiting 6/6
scorecards.watch_out: watch out for slower first-response time across the pack

scorecards.label: RR (q=2)
scorecards.use_when: best when minimizing dispatch churn matters most
scorecards.headline: strongest relative showing on low overhead, response without outright pack wins
scorecards.watch_out: watch out for a less even slowdown spread across processes

scorecards.label: MLFQ interactive (q=1/2/4, boost=8)
scorecards.use_when: best when interactive first-response speed matters most
scorecards.headline: response 5/6
scorecards.watch_out: watch out for higher queueing delay across the pack

scorecards.label: MLFQ balanced (q=2/4/8, boost=12)
scorecards.use_when: best when per-process fairness matters most
scorecards.headline: fairness 2/6, response 1/6
scorecards.watch_out: watch out for slower total turnaround across the pack

scorecards.label: MLFQ throughput (q=4/8/16, boost=off)
scorecards.use_when: best when minimizing dispatch churn matters most
scorecards.headline: low overhead 3/6, throughput 3/6
scorecards.watch_out: watch out for slower first-response time across the pack
